text.title: Google Shopping Ads Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-feed
step.action: Score health on titles / GTIN / images / attributes; fix to ≥80%.
step.decision-gate: If <80% after fix attempt, STOP and route to merchant team.

step.name: split-priority-tiers
step.action: Create high / medium / clearance campaigns with priority + ROAS target.

step.name: partition-product-groups
step.action: Split product groups by margin or category, not 'All products'.

step.name: apply-negative-keywords
step.action: Apply free / used / jobs / torrent + brand-specific negatives.

step.name: set-roas-targets
step.action: ROAS target per tier (high ≥4, mid ≥2.5, clear ≥1.5).
